global_context.scene_description: A cinematic editorial flat-lay or overhead shot on a clean light grey or near-white surface. The composition is split into two columns. LEFT COLUMN: a stack/list of seven recognizable monthly subscription service cards/receipts arranged vertically, each shown as a clean rectangular card with the service name and monthly price clearly visible. The cards from top to bottom: 'NETFLIX - $22.99/mo', 'SPOTIFY - $11.99/mo', 'iPHONE PLAN - $85/mo', 'DISNEY+ - $15.99/mo', 'HULU - $17.99/mo', 'GYM - $40/mo', 'AMAZON PRIME - $14.99/mo'. Below the stack a clean total line: 'TOTAL: $208.95/mo'. NOT real brand logos rendered in detail (to avoid trademark issues) but stylized generic-but-recognizable card designs in each brand's color palette. RIGHT COLUMN: a single clean stand-alone card showing 'ASH COOLING & HEATING - NEW AC INSTALL - $250/mo - 0% APR - PRICE MATCH'. The single ASH card is the same size as one subscription card from the left, visually emphasizing that this is just ONE more line in your monthly budget. A center vertical comparison axis or thin separator line. At the top of the frame, a clean bold sans-serif headline reads: 'YOUR NEW AC COSTS LESS THAN YOUR SUBSCRIPTIONS.' Small italic caption at bottom: 'New AC install. $250/mo. 0% APR. Price match. Done in a day.' Lighting: soft even editorial overhead, almost product photography. Mood: cold financial reframe. Editorial product still life, NOT documentary photo, NOT cartoon, NOT a flat infographic.

composition.framing: horizontal frame with two-column comparison, subscription stack on left, single ASH card on right
composition.focal_point: the visual contrast that the ASH card is similar in size to a single subscription
